ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: If you trade stocks and want to support us, please consider use TradeInsight.info , it is another project from us.
ast.target: 如果你交易股票并想支持我们，请考虑使用 TradeInsight.info , 这是我们的另一个项目。

ast.target: 生成 BLB URL 时出错：

ast.name: error
ast.target: 生成 Bible Gateway URL 时出错：

ast.name: error
ast.target: 生成 Logos URL 时出错：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add a hidden book tag at bottom, for example #John
ast.target: 在底部添加隐藏的书卷标签，例如 #John

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add a hidden chapter tag at bottom, for example #John1
ast.target: 在底部添加隐藏的章节标签，例如 #John1

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Makes an outgoing link for the book, for example [[John]]
ast.target: 为书卷创建外部链接，例如 [[John]]

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Makes an outgoing link for the chapter, for example [[John1]]
ast.target: 为章节创建外部链接，例如 [[John1]]

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how to display verses that span multiple chapters (e.g., John 1:1-2:5)
ast.target: 选择如何显示跨多个章节的经文（例如 John 1:1-2:5）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose the Bible version you prefer
ast.target: 选择你偏好的圣经版本

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose the Bible version to use for Logos links when your selected version is not supported by Logos
ast.target: 当你选择的版本不受 Logos 支持时，选择用于 Logos 链接的圣经版本

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The way of display the selected Bible Version at status bar
ast.target: 在状态栏显示所选圣经版本的方式

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where to put the reference link of the Bible
ast.target: 将圣经参考链接放置在何处

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Sets how to format the verses in Obsidian, either line by line or in 1 paragraph
ast.target: 设置在 Obsidian 中经文的格式，是逐行显示还是合并为一段

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show or hide the verse translation in verses reference
ast.target: 在经文引用中显示或隐藏经文译文

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable or disable hyperlinking in the verses reference
ast.target: 在经文引用中启用或禁用超链接

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose the source for verse reference links: Original (API provider), Blue Letter Bible, Bible Gateway, or Logos
ast.target: 选择经文引用链接的来源：原始（API 提供商）、Blue Letter Bible、Bible Gateway 或 Logos

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Sets how to format the verse numbers in Obsidian
ast.target: 设置在 Obsidian 中经文编号的格式

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When using a chapter separator, include the chapter number (e.g., "--- 2 ---")
ast.target: 使用章节分隔符时，包含章节编号（例如 "--- 2 ---"）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how to display non-contiguous verses (e.g., John 3:16, 19)
ast.target: 选择如何显示不连续的经文（例如 John 3:16, 19）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When this is true, it will render a Bible icon in Obsidian, disable this if you want to hide it or use standard Markdown. (This will disable the Collapsible option below)
ast.target: 启用后，会在 Obsidian 中渲染一个圣经图标；如果要隐藏它或使用标准 Markdown，请禁用此项。（这将禁用下面的可折叠选项）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Make the rendered verses collapsible, (This option will be disabled if Bible Icon Prefix option above is disabled)
ast.target: 使渲染的经文可折叠（如果上面的“圣经图标前缀”选项被禁用，此选项将被禁用）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When verses are collapsible, set the default state to open or closed ((This option will be disabled if Make Verses Collapsible option above is disabled))
ast.target: 当经文可折叠时，将默认状态设为展开或折叠（如果上面的“使经文可折叠”选项被禁用，此选项将被禁用）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display or Hide Expert Settings, such as Tagging, Linking, Events Logging settings
ast.target: 显示或隐藏专家设置，例如标签、链接、事件日志设置

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Add Internal Linking to the Verse Numbers
ast.target: 为经节编号添加内部链接

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Display Selected Version at Status Bar
ast.target: 在状态栏显示所选版本

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: This will show the verse translation verse text after the verse number
ast.target: 这将在节号后显示该节的译文文本

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: This will make the verse number clickable and will open the passage for viewing.
ast.target: 这将使节号可点击，并打开经文进行查看。

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Select which service to use for generating verse reference links. This only applies when hyperlinking is enabled.
ast.target: 选择用于生成经文引用链接的服务。此设置仅在启用超链接时适用。

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: This will set the default state of the collapsible verses, when you open a note, the verses will be open or closed by default
ast.target: 这将设置可折叠经文的默认状态，打开笔记时，经文默认展开或折叠。

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: This option is disabled because collapsible is off
ast.target: 此选项已禁用，因为折叠功能已关闭

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Some chapters could not be loaded. Showing partial results.
ast.target: 部分章节无法加载。显示部分结果。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 多章节分隔符设置已更新

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Bible Verse Format Number Settings Updated
ast.target: 经文格式编号设置已更新

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 经文段落分隔符设置已更新

ast.name: description
ast.target: 章节分隔符（在章节之间添加分隔线）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Verse Separator (Add divider between non-contiguous verses)
ast.target: 经文分隔符（在不连续的经文之间添加分隔符）

ast.source: Verse Of The Day - Notice (10 Seconds)
